title: Digest draft is ready for review
body: The weekly digest draft now covers promoted Atlas updates, learning reminders, and one new best bet for search.

title: Atlas launch review moved to Thursday
body: We tightened the launch narrative and pushed the review one day so the doc export and Slides deck stay aligned.

title: Two lessons due this week
body: Finish the launch sequence course and bring one question to office hours. The Calendar event is already mirrored.
